name: GIGABYTE B850 EAGLE WIFI7 ICE ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - Support DDR5-8200(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 1 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5G LAN - 802.11be Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4
shortName: GIGABYTE B850 EAGLE WIFI7 ICE ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe
description: Mid-range AM5 ATX motherboard with DDR5 and PCIe 5.0 support, featuring Wi-Fi 7 and multiple display outputs.

specs.pcie_slots: 1x PCIe 5.0 x16, 1x PCIe 4.0 x4, 2x PCIe 3.0 x1
